title: Forge build manifest (forge.yaml)
description: Repo-root forge.yaml describing the service identity and Docker build inputs.

name.description: DNS-safe service name (lowercase, starts with a letter).

port.description: Container listen port for the built service.

dockerfile.description: Dockerfile path relative to the repository root (no path traversal).

context.description: Docker build context path relative to the repository root (no path traversal).
